# W29T5 Implementation Plan

## Task Goal

Integrate the full integration-test, doctest, and benchmark verification matrix into CI for the supported `std` environment. This task turns the Wave 29 test inventory into a stable repository workflow without expanding the platform matrix or adding new test-only dependencies.

## Related Design Documents

- `design/28-tests.md` §1.2
- `design/28-tests.md` §8.23
- `design/28-tests.md` Appendix A.2-A.5
- `design/28-tests.md` Appendix task list, Wave 3 T14 and Wave 5 T16
- `design/29-documentation.md` §5.11, for docs and example verification overlap
- `design/01-architecture.md` §3, CI-facing test and docs directories

## Dependencies

- W29T2
- W29T3
- W29T4

## Files to Create/Modify

- `.github/workflows/test.yml`
- potentially existing CI helper scripts already used by the repository-local compile-fail harness

## Implementation Details

### Required feature matrix

Implement the documented CI combinations from `design/28-tests.md` Appendix A.2 and task T16:

- default configuration: `cargo test --lib --tests`
- parallel configuration: `cargo test --lib --tests --features parallel`
- simd configuration: `cargo test --lib --tests --features simd`
- all-features configuration: `cargo test --lib --tests --all-features`

Also include doctest coverage per matrix row:

- `cargo test --doc`
- `cargo test --doc --features parallel`
- `cargo test --doc --features simd`
- `cargo test --doc --all-features`

### CI scope limits

- `std` environment only
- no extra platform compilation branches
- no coverage gate
- no new third-party test framework dependencies

### Integration with specialized tests

Ensure the matrix is compatible with:

- `tests/test_parallel.rs` under `parallel`
- `tests/test_simd.rs` under `simd`
- compile-fail harness under repository-local tooling
- property tests and all specialized integration tests in the default matrix

## Test Plan

- Validate `.github/workflows/test.yml` syntax
- Run the default local equivalent: `cargo test --lib --tests`
- Run `cargo test --lib --tests --features parallel`
- Run `cargo test --lib --tests --features simd`
- Run `cargo test --lib --tests --all-features`
- Run the corresponding `cargo test --doc` commands

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] CI matrix covers default, `parallel`, `simd`, and `all-features`
- [ ] The workflow stays limited to the documented `std` environment
- [ ] Doctests run alongside the integration-test matrix
- [ ] `test_parallel.rs` and `test_simd.rs` are only exercised where their feature requirements are satisfied
- [ ] No extra platform or coverage gates are introduced beyond the design document

## Development Workflow

1. Start from the minimal CI matrix in `design/28-tests.md` Appendix A.2.
2. Add the four feature configurations for `cargo test --lib --tests`.
3. Add matching doctest steps.
4. Confirm feature-gated test files line up with the right matrix entries.
5. Keep the workflow limited to `std` and avoid unrelated CI expansion.
